title: SUNCO DATA-SPEC SPEC-BLOCK
description: Schema for the YAML SPEC-BLOCK fenced inside DATA-SPEC.md produced by backend-phase-data (Phase 45/M3.4). Per spec R2 (SUNCO:SPEC-BLOCK deterministic extraction) and BS1 (schema versioning). Lenient additive: listed fields required, additionalProperties permitted so downstream phases (Phase 47 backend-review-data) may extend without schema bump.

version.description: Schema version per BS1. Constant 1 for Phase 45 output.

entities.description: Entity inventory with fields, indexes, constraints, and relationships.

fields.description: Field list. Each field entry is a string (type-annotated name) or a structured object.

relationships.description: Relationships to other entities (belongsTo / hasMany / manyToMany etc.). Per-entity; no top-level relationships block.

migration_strategy.description: How schema changes will be deployed. expand-contract = two-phase (add nullable then backfill then tighten); in-place = direct ALTER with a maintenance window.

retention_policy.description: Data retention and lifecycle rules. Optional shape — may be null when retention is indefinite / not yet decided. When present, should capture at least the retention unit (days / forever / tiered).

anti_pattern_watchlist.description: Phase 42 backend-excellence anti-patterns this data model must avoid. Done-when (Phase 45) requires at least 3 entries, each citing a Phase 42 reference file (data-modeling.md / migrations-and-compatibility.md).
